summary: Iteration 37: Frontend testing of Carte page (/command/center) sidebar pagination feature. All 10 test scenarios passed. Tested: login, navigation to Carte page, assets sidebar loading (not stuck on skeleton), pagination visibility showing '1–30 / 500', next page navigation (31–60 / 500), prev page navigation (back to 1–30 / 500), filter chips reset page to 1, search input filters and resets page, asset click opens detail panel with map centering, KPIs in topbar load with values.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Login with admin/user@1234 - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
TEST 2: Navigate to /command/center - Carte page loads with enterprise-command component
TEST 3: Assets sidebar loads with 30 items (not stuck on skeleton loading)
TEST 4: Sidebar pagination visible at bottom showing '1–30 / 500' format
TEST 5: Click next page button - pagination updates to '31–60 / 500' and items change (REFV618, REFV619...)
TEST 6: Click prev page button - pagination goes back to '1–30 / 500'
TEST 7: Filter chips (Sorti) filter the list and reset page to 1 - shows 12 items, pagination hidden
TEST 8: Search input filters assets and resets page to 1
TEST 9: Clicking an asset opens detail panel with status, battery gauge, location, and action buttons
TEST 10: KPIs in topbar load with values (0 Assets actifs, 4 Réserv. actives, 4 En attente, 3 En retard, 41 Alertes, 500 Batt. faible)
TEST 11: Other filter chips work - Actif (0 items), Inactif (486 items with pagination 1–30 / 486)
critical_code_review_comments: assetPage state (line 99): Correctly initialized to 1 and managed for pagination
ASSETS_PER_PAGE constant (line 100): Set to 30 items per page as requested
Pagination calculation (lines 210-212): Correctly calculates totalAssetPages, safeAssetPage, and paginatedAssets slice
Filter reset (line 426): setAssetPage(1) called when filter chip clicked - working correctly
Search reset (line 421): setAssetPage(1) called when search input changes - working correctly
Sidebar pagination UI (lines 469-482): Properly shows prev/next buttons with disabled states and page info
Pagination hidden when < 30 results: totalAssetPages > 1 condition correctly hides pagination for small result sets
Loading state fix: External API logs fetched in background (non-blocking) after main data loads (lines 129-138)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 tested Carte page (/command/center) sidebar pagination feature. Key data-testids verified: enterprise-command, assets-sidebar, assets-list, sidebar-pagination, sidebar-pg-info, sidebar-pg-prev, sidebar-pg-next, filter-all, filter-active, filter-exit, filter-nonactive, assets-search, asset-item-{i}, topbar-kpis, kpi-{i}, asset-detail-panel, detail-close. Pagination shows 30 items per page with format 'X–Y / total'. Pagination controls work correctly. Filter and search reset page to 1. Pagination hides when filtered results < 30 items. External API is slow (12+ seconds) - wait accordingly.
